scene_input.key_visual_action: Muhammad sitting up, looking around in confusion

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 104
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of patience and trust in Allah's plan

characters.name: the central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture

schema_output.narrative_text: Muhammad woke up to an unfamiliar place, looking around in confusion.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Exterior of a 7th century Makkah desert city with sandy dunes and rocky outcrops in the background. Early morning golden sunlight casts a warm glow over the scene, with a few wispy clouds in the sky. In the foreground, a modest 7th century Makkah home with unpainted mud-brick walls in warm earth tones and a packed-earth floor partly covered by a woven palm-fiber mat. The central figure, seen entirely from behind, sits cross-legged on the mat, looking around in confusion. The figure has a medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture. The atmosphere is calm and peaceful, with a sense of mystery. Wide shot at eye level. Soft warm golden light, dominant beige and cream palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
